product: Serverless environment version 5 is now available
tagline: You can now use serverless environment version 5 in your serverless notebooks and jobs.
what_it_does: You can now use serverless environment version 5 in your serverless notebooks and jobs. This includes both the CPU and GPU environment versions.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: You can now use serverless environment version 5 in your serverless notebooks and jobs. This includes both the CPU and GPU environment versions.
key_takeaway: You can now use serverless environment version 5 in your serverless notebooks and jobs.
